title: Cloud Boots
description: Adds more balanced and polished "Cloud Boots" from mod called Chocolate Quest aka Better Dungeons by Chocolatin.
body:
![Cloud Boots Logo](https://i.imgur.com/EydMGUN.png)
## ☁️About Cloud Boots

This mod adds more balanced and polished **_"Cloud Boots"_** from mod called **_Chocolate Quest_** aka **_Better Dungeons_** by **Chocolatin**.

Mod is a little modernized, but I try to preserve original feel.

## ☁️Showcase in 3D
![Cloud Boots Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/dNHAox0.gif)
## ☁️Features
### Cloud Boots:
- Have 416 durability points
- Grants fall damage immunity (if Your fall speed is maximum -3 (130 blocks jump))
- +20% movement speed
- +4 jump height
- Effects decrease with durability(4 stages, e.g. 50% durability is half effects power)
- Damages item when falling (if Your fall speed is -1.2 or more)
### Golden Feather:
- Have 100 durability points
- Grants fall damage immunity (if Your fall speed is maximum -2 (40 blocks jump))
- Damages item when falling (if Your fall speed is -0.8 or more)
- Must be held in any hand to work
## ☁️Recipes
![Golden Feather Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/GBmQCPJ.png)
![Cloud Boots Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/vBSPuwY.png)
## ☁️Credits
Chocolate Quest/Better Dungeons: [curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-dungeons)
